title: Metagraphed Saved Query Template
description: Maintainer-curated parameterized query template exposed via run_saved_query (MCP) and GET /api/v1/queries/{id} (REST) -- admin-curated only, never user-submitted. Each template's underlying implementation wraps an existing derived-view module (a build*/compose* function already served elsewhere) and runs with elevated query trust, unlike the public GraphQL tool's own per-request depth/complexity sandboxing.

id.description: Stable identifier: run_saved_query's query_id argument and the REST route's GET /api/v1/queries/{id} path segment.

description.description: What the query returns and why it's curated -- shown to callers via list discovery and the MCP tool description.

category.description: Grouping for discovery. Extend this enum, don't bypass it, when a new template doesn't fit an existing category.

params.description: The template's own parameter shape, validated against a caller's params before the underlying implementation runs. Empty for a template with no inputs.

enum.description: Allowed values for a string param. Omit for a free-form string or any integer param.

default.description: Value used when the param is omitted and not required.

minimum.description: Inclusive lower bound for an integer param.

maximum.description: Inclusive upper bound for an integer param.

notes.description: One line on the underlying implementation -- which existing module/function it wraps.
